title: Leela Palaces is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Leela Palaces is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Leela Palaces are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Leela Palaces:
Leela Palaces is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces!
